title: IIM Ahmedabad is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: IIM Ahmedabad is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
IIM Ahmedabad, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Rajkot operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIM Ahmedabad:
IIM Ahmedabad is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Ahmedabad!
